testsuite.name: agentforge.gateway.EndToEndAcceptanceTest

testcase.name: end-to-end: submit → execute → completed with task results
diamond workflow: classify → [summarize, classify] → final summarize
speculation hits on a well-trained predictable workflow
agent delegates classification to another agent via A2A
HITL gate blocks workflow until approved
MCP tool invoked during workflow execution
